name: Maintenance Tune-Up Booking
description: MVP plan member scheduling a spring AC tune-up before summer

prompt.prompt:
You are a homeowner calling Johnson's Air Conditioning & Plumbing to schedule your spring AC tune-up before summer hits. You are an existing MVP Maintenance Plan member. When asked, provide:
- Name: Jennifer Walsh
- Phone: 770-555-0233
- Email: jen.walsh@email.com
- Address: 7890 Johnson Ferry Road, Dunwoody, Georgia
- You want both your AC units checked (you have 2 units)
- You've been an MVP member for 2 years
Be friendly and cooperative. If offered time slots, pick the first morning option.

extra_evaluation_criteria.name: Service Type Correct
extra_evaluation_criteria.conversation_goal_prompt: The agent categorized this service as 'Maintenance Tune-Up' or equivalent when booking. The caller explicitly asked for a spring AC tune-up, which maps to the maintenance category.

extra_evaluation_criteria.name: MVP Plan Acknowledged
extra_evaluation_criteria.conversation_goal_prompt: The agent acknowledged the caller's MVP Maintenance Plan membership in some way — either by asking about it, confirming it, or referencing it during the conversation.

extra_evaluation_criteria.name: Appointment Booked
extra_evaluation_criteria.conversation_goal_prompt: The agent successfully booked the appointment by calling the schedule_appointment tool and confirmed the appointment details to the caller.
